## MainScroll.visibleElementsObserver property

Creates an `IntersectionObserver` to detect the first visible elements. Children of this component should register themselves if they want to be observed.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
get visibleElementsObserver(): ScrollVisibilityObserver | null;
```
